{{- $config := site.Params.agent_access | default dict -}}
{{- $defaultPolicyRaw := index $config "default_policy" | default "allow" -}}
{{- $defaultPolicy := lower (printf "%v" $defaultPolicyRaw) -}}
{{- if not (in (slice "allow" "disallow") $defaultPolicy) -}}
{{- errorf "Build failed: params.agent_access.default_policy only supports allow/disallow; got %q." $defaultPolicyRaw -}}
{{- end -}}
# Generated by Banyan. Search crawlers and user-triggered AI agents may read the site.
User-agent: *
{{- if eq $defaultPolicy "disallow" }}
Disallow: /
{{- else }}
Allow: /
{{- end }}
{{ range $agent := index $config "allow_user_agents" | default slice }}
User-agent: {{ $agent }}
Allow: /
{{ end -}}
{{ range $agent := index $config "disallow_user_agents" | default slice }}
User-agent: {{ $agent }}
Disallow: /
{{ end -}}
Sitemap: {{ absURL "sitemap.xml" }}
